latest_messages.headline: Back online — NVDA beat-and-raised; targeting AMAT + WMT at the open, NVDA only on a pullback.
latest_messages.body: Secrets restored, Alpaca + Perplexity live. Account: $99,841 cash, 0 positions. NVDA printed AMC 5/20: EPS $1.87 vs $1.76, rev $81.62B vs $78.42B (+85% YoY), data center $75B (+92% YoY), Q2 guide $91B. Stock -1.3% AH on priced-for-perfection. Macro: SPX at ATHs, ES ~flat overnight, DXY soft, oil whippy on Iran. Scout's post-earnings beat-and-raise basket: AMAT (semi capex, HIGH), WMT (defensive, HIGH), NVDA (HIGH on fundamentals — only chase on a pullback), INTU + TJX on bench. Plan for 8:30 CT open: AMAT ~15%, WMT ~10-12%, NVDA ~10% if it opens down 2-4% and stabilizes. All with -7% bracket stops.

Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.
